display.purpose: Primary page headings. One per view.

title.purpose: Card headers, section titles, modal headings.

label.purpose: Sidebar navigation, table headers, form labels, chip text.

mono.purpose: IDs, timestamps, data values, key word matches.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default easing for all interactive state changes (hover, focus, active, selection).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. One per view, used for the main call to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-accent); color: #fff; padding: 6px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-accent-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Compact text input for filters, search, and forms.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 6px; background: var(--color-bg-main); color: var(--color-text-primary); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-muted); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-accent); }

components.name: Navigation Item (Sidebar)
components.description: Sidebar navigation link with icon and label.
components.html: <button class="ds-nav-item"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg>Комментарии</button>
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; width: 100%; padding: 6px 8px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--color-bg-hover); color: var(--color-text-primary); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-item.active { background: var(--color-accent-soft); color: var(--color-accent); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact status indicator for table rows and badges.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-chip-success { background: var(--color-success-soft); color: var(--color-success); } .ds-chip-warning { background: var(--color-warning-soft); color: var(--color-warning); } .ds-chip-danger { background: var(--color-danger-soft); color: var(--color-danger); }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Data table row with hover and selected states.
components.html: #142Пример комментарияГруппа А
components.css: .ds-table-row { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-table-row:hover { background: var(--color-bg-hover); } .ds-table-row--selected { background: var(--color-accent-soft); } .ds-table-cell { padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-text-primary); text-align: left; }

components.name: Detail Panel
components.description: Right-side detail drawer for inspecting a selected item.
components.html:
Детали
АвторИванов
Статус
components.css: .ds-panel { width: 320px; height: 100%; border-left: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-bg-panel); display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-panel-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); } .ds-panel-header span { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-text-primary); } .ds-panel-close { background: none; border: none; padding: 4px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--color-text-muted); transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-panel-close:hover { color: var(--color-text-primary); } .ds-panel-body { padding: 16px; flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .ds-panel-field { margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-panel-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-text-muted); } .ds-panel-value { display: block; margin-top: 2px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-text-primary); }

narrative.overview:
ParseVK is an operator workspace for identifying unlawful speech across social media. The interface is a board where evidence — comments, posts, author patterns — is brought into focus, examined, and acted upon. Every pixel serves the task: there is no decoration, no marketing, no flourish that doesn't carry information or afford an action.

The system is restrained by default. A single blue-teal accent marks primary actions, active selection, and focus. Neutrals are tinted cool to create a calm, clinical reading environment. Flat surfaces with tonal layering replace shadows: depth is conveyed through background lightness, not drop shadows. This is an instrument, not a dashboard poster.

Three named references define the aesthetic lane: Linear (pristine state handling, typographic precision), Grafana (dense data presentation, semantic color discipline), and Figma (sidebar navigation, panel-based layout).
keyCharacteristics: Flat by default: tonal layers, no shadows
Tools, not decoration: every element carries information or action
Dark + light themes with user toggle

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The accent color is used on 10% or less of any given surface. Its rarity gives it meaning. A second accent may appear only for semantic contrast (statuses, badges, data highlights).

rules.name: The Border Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is established through borders first. Shadows are never used for surface separation. Flat stacking (lighter/darker background) is the depth system.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk carries the entire interface. No display and body pairing, no serif for headings. The weight range (300–700) provides sufficient contrast between hierarchy steps at a 1.25 ratio.

dos: Do use the Command Blue accent sparingly — one element per view where the user must act.
Do use tonal layering for depth: lighter backgrounds for surfaces closer to the user, darker for containers.
Do keep tables dense but readable: generous horizontal padding, tight vertical rhythm.
Do use semantic color for status indicators only: green for clean, red for violation, amber for review.
Do use the right panel for detail views instead of modals.
Do transition states at 150ms with ease-out timing.
donts: Don't use clown colors: neon, acidic, toy-grade palettes of any kind.
Don't design landing page hero sections, decorative headlines, or marketing blocks inside the application.
Don't style the interface as a terminal or console (green text on black, command-line metaphors).
Don't use gradient text for any purpose.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop blur on cards, translucent glass panels).
Don't use cards as the default layout container. Tables and flat sections are preferred.
Don't use modal dialogs as the first solution for detail views.
Don't use side-stripe borders as a colored accent.
Don't use display fonts in UI labels, buttons, or body text.
Don't use bounce or elastic timing functions for transitions.
